headline: Accenture (ACN) Could Be 54% Undervalued As Investors Reassess Its AI Narrative
summary: Accenture (ACN) has drawn fresh attention after appointing Pradeep Prabhala to lead its India Market Unit, a move focused on data, AI, and Global Capability Centers for both local and global clients. See our latest analysis for Accenture. Accenture’s recent leadership moves in India and plans to deploy about US$9b on acquisitions in higher growth areas sit against a mixed share price picture, with a 12.22% 1 month share price return but a year to date share price decline of 46.11% and a 1...
